instructions: Ensure the addition of systemd sandboxing directives does not incur noticeable service start delays.
Check that minor parsing changes or tracking updates do not introduce I/O overhead.
If strict sandboxing causes a service failure, ensure the logged output remains clear and actionable for developers.
Ensure markdown updates to checklist tracking remain properly formatted.
Audit the specific systemd directives added to ensure they effectively sandbox the services without causing regressions in core OS functionality (like updates or user creation).
